description.zh: 深度洞察人性的本质与社会互动的底层逻辑。
description.en: A profound insight into the nature of humanity and the underlying logic of social interaction.

title.zh: 李晟传：再造社稷的大唐忠武
title.en: Li Sheng: The Loyal Warrior Who Reforged the Tang Dynasty

description.zh: 中唐名将李晟的生平传记，深还原一位挽狂澜于既倒、扶大厦之将倾的铁血忠魂。
description.en: A biography of Li Sheng, the great Tang general who saved the dynasty from collapse, restoring the empire through unwavering loyalty and martial prowess.

title.en: Artificial: Craft, Intelligence, and Second Nature

description.zh: 从词源、古典哲学与中国工器传统出发，贯穿海德格尔、马克思、图灵、香农，重新夺回“人工”一词的尊严，提出专深人工智能（ASI）的完整定义与工程原则。
description.en: Reclaiming the dignity of "artificial" — from etymology and classical philosophy through Heidegger, Marx, Turing, and Shannon, this treatise proposes a principled path toward Artificial Special Intelligence distinct from AGI.
